title: ALS Gene Expression Analysis (WGCNA)
description: Analyzed ALS datasets from frontal cortex, motor cortex, and spinal cord using R, performing Weighted Gene Co-expression Network Analysis (WGCNA) and GO enrichment to identify 20+ disease-related gene modules.

title: Bioinformatics Pipeline for ALS Research
description: Developed an integrated bioinformatics pipeline combining dry lab analysis with wet lab experiments including Maxiprep plasmid purification to advance regenerative medicine research at the Sanford Consortium.

title: Protein Structure Prediction with PyTorch
description: Applied PyTorch deep learning models to predict molecular behaviors and improve protein structure analysis accuracy by 15% at the KAIST AI Chemistry Laboratory in Daejeon, South Korea.

title: Chemical Relationship Visualization Pipeline
description: Developed data pipelines and visualizations for chemical relationship predictions, streamlining data collection and analysis through automation and script optimization at KAIST University.

title: Patient Care Data Management System
description: Supported data-driven patient check-in and triage workflows at La Jolla Green Hospital Urgent Care, facilitating communication between departments and improving operational efficiency.

title: Cyclic Voltammetry Data Analysis
description: Analyzed large datasets using Python and Excel to identify key electrochemical research trends, and developed standard operating procedures for electrochemical testing at Pukyong National University.

title: Electrochemical Properties Research
description: Designed and conducted cyclic voltammetry experiments to assess electrochemical properties of novel materials, contributing to ongoing battery and energy storage research at Pukyong National University.

title: Electrochemistry Lab Automation
description: Automated data collection workflows for electrochemical experiments, reducing manual processing time and improving reproducibility of experimental results in the Pukyong National University lab.

title: DSC 106 Lab 4: JavaScript II
description: Built dynamic project rendering from a JSON data file, integrated GitHub API to display live profile stats, and implemented templating with async JavaScript fetch on a personal portfolio website.

title: DSC 106 Lab 3: JavaScript I
description: Automated navigation menu generation, implemented dark mode switching with localStorage persistence, and built a better contact form using JS form interception and encodeURIComponent encoding.

title: DSC 106 Lab 2: Styling with CSS
description: Styled a personal portfolio site using Flexbox navigation, CSS Grid for project layout, subgrid for content alignment, and CSS custom properties for accent colors and dark mode support.

title: DSC 106 Lab 1: Personal Portfolio
description: Built a multi-page personal portfolio website from scratch using semantic HTML, including a home page, projects page, contact form, and resume page with structured sections for education and experience.
